name: duplicate-key
notes: Duplicate key agent_id (values a and b). RFC 7159 section 4 leaves duplicate-key behavior undefined; parsers diverge. serde_json last-wins: agent_id becomes did:web:agent-b.example.com; JCS canonical bytes and SHA-256 diverge from the baseline. Implementations MUST reject or detect duplicate keys before canonicalization; silent last-wins is a stratum issue that cannot be recovered post-parse. expected_divergent_digest is the digest of the last-wins canonical form for impls that do not reject at parse.
